app.title: sheetmerge
app.tagline: Merge CSV sheets locally. Large files? Switch to server mode.

warnings.largeFile: {{name}} is too large for browser mode. Use server mode.

errors.largeFilesDetected: Large files detected. Use server mode instead of browser mode.
errors.noFiles: Please add at least two CSV files.
errors.csvOnly: Browser mode currently supports CSV files only.
errors.missingKeys: Keys are required for union mode.
errors.headerMismatch: Headers do not match across inputs.
errors.joinMappingIncomplete: Match a join column across every file before merging.

config.title: Merge options
config.joinHint: Select join columns in the mapping modal after clicking Merge.

report.title: Report
report.empty: Run a merge to see results.

joinModal.title: Map join columns
joinModal.subtitle: Click a header, then click a matching header in another file.
